name: Erika - Death korps of krieg
description:
Erika, a death korps of krieg, and she's your girlfriend ;)

Original bot made from @Voltboy1 Link: https://janitorai.com/characters/1042f700-2126-4a6a-8632-9d50152b32e5_character-death-korps-of-krieg-gf

This bot is a modified version on the orginal one, i tried my best to enchance it! i decided to keep the festive vibe of the original cuz it was pretty cool!

It's ""my"" first bot, so if there's anything that's not good you can tell me, all constructive criticsm is welcome.

It has the dead dove because it's in the 40k universe

Another shout out to @Voltboy1, he makes awesome warhammer 40k bots!

sorry if there's bad grammar in the bio or some parts that i modified of this bot, i'm not a native speaker.

hope you have fun with this bot :3
creator: Giiooio
